products.title: Hermes Chypre Sandal "Brown Suede"
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) Introduced in 2020, the Hermès Chypre sandal has quickly become a favorite for all H collectors—a sleek design for a comfortable casual look all year round. This pair is crafted from Etoupe suede with anatomical rubber soles and adjustable straps. This style comes with the original dust bag and box. This pre-owned pair will make a great contribution towards sustainability and an even greater contribution towards your wardrobe.

products.title: Hermes Chypre Sandal "Bleu Minéral"
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) Techno-sandal in suede goatskin with anatomical rubber sole and adjustable strap. A sleek design for a comfortable and casual look.

products.title: Hermes Chypre sandal "Golden Brown"
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) Techno-sandal in woven ribbon and calfskin. An interlaced silhouette inspired by the "H" signature motif, a casual look perfect for summer.
